ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "body_length" INTEGER /* Length of the issue body */,
  "mean_comment_size" REAL /* Average size of comments on the issue */,
  "actors" INTEGER /* Number of actors involved in the issue */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Date the issue was closed */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the issue was last updated */,
  "depends_on" INTEGER /* ID of the issue this issue depends on */,
  "related_pull_request" INTEGER /* ID of the related pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_depends_on FOREIGN KEY ("depends_on") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Whether the project is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the actor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the actor was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the actor was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the actor is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_actors" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the issue (e.g., creator, assignee, commenter) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment belongs to */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor who made the comment */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been marked as resolved */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was marked as resolved */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the commit is related to */,
  "sha" TEXT /* SHA of the commit */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the commit */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the commit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the commit was created */,
  "commit_url" TEXT /* URL of the commit */,
  "is_merged" INTEGER /* Whether the commit has been merged */,
  "merged_at" TEXT /* Date the commit was merged */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the commit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the label is assigned to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the label was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the label was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)
